experience.title: Freelance Developer
experience.description: As a freelance developer, I actively participated in meetings with the customer and development team, in order to accomplish an enrollment system for a high school. This project was built using React, NESTJS, and MySQL.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
experience.description: As a software developer intern, I was able to collaborate with a team from an external enterprise which provided the development service. I had to accomplish different tasks working under the Scrum Methodology with React and Firebase while attending to the customer's decisions about the applications I was involved in.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: As a software developer, I was in charge of building new user interfaces using React and Firebase. In some projects, I was also building REST APIs using ExpressJS to use Firebase Admin, provide an extra security layer, and handle Firebase Triggers with listeners.
